nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Isabelle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isabel
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabelle I de Jérusalem Reine de Jérusalem was born in 1172, her father, Amaury Ier de Jérusalem Roi de Jérusalem, was 36 and her mother, Marie Comnène Reine de Jérusalem, was 18. She married Humphrey IV of Toron in 1183, in Al Karak, Ma`ān, Jordan. She died on 5 April 1205, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabelle I de Jérusalem Reine de Jérusalem est née en 1172, son père, Amaury Ier de Jérusalem Roi de Jérusalem, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Marie Comnène Reine de Jérusalem, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Humphrey IV of Toron en 1183, à Al Karak, Ma`ān, Jordanie. Elle est décédée le 5 avril 1205, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabelle I de Jérusalem Reine de Jérusalem 1172 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Amaury Ier de Jérusalem Roi de Jérusalem 36 und ihre Mutter Marie Comnène Reine de Jérusalem 18. Sie hat 1183 in Al Karak, Ma`ān, Jordanien Humphrey IV of Toron geheiratet. Sie starb am 5. April 1205 im Alter von 33 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle I de Jérusalem Reine de Jérusalem è nata il nel 1172, sua padre, Amaury Ier de Jérusalem Roi de Jérusalem, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Marie Comnène Reine de Jérusalem, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Humphrey IV of Toron nel 1183, nel Al Karak, Ma`ān, Giordania. Morì il 5 aprile 1205, all'età di 33 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Isabelle I de Jérusalem Reine de Jérusalem(이)가 1172년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Amaury Ier de Jérusalem Roi de Jérusalem(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marie Comnène Reine de Jérusalem(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1183년 요르단 마`a الكرك에서 Humphrey IV of Toron(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1205년 4월 5일 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Humphrey IV of Toron em 1183, em Al Karak, Ma`ān, Jordânia. Ela faleceu em 5 de abril de 1205, com 33 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabelle I de Jérusalem Reine de Jérusalem родилась в 1172 г., её отцу по имени Amaury Ier de Jérusalem Roi de Jérusalem было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Marie Comnène Reine de Jérusalem, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Humphrey IV of Toron в 1183 г. в местности الكرك, ма`aн, Иордания. Она умерла 5 апреля 1205 г. в возрасте 33 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabelle I de Jérusalem Reine de Jérusalem nació en 1172, su papá, Amaury Ier de Jérusalem Roi de Jérusalem, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Marie Comnène Reine de Jérusalem, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Humphrey IV of Toron en 1183, en Al Karak, Ma`ān, Jordania. Murió el 5 de abril de 1205, a la edad de 33 años.
